about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: DK Tech - your path to adventure
about.story_text: DK Tech was founded with one goal - to make world-class powersports vehicles accessible to Russian outdoor enthusiasts. We are an authorized dealer of BRP and Polaris, offering a full range of services from new vehicle sales to professional service maintenance.
about.mission_text: We believe everyone deserves the opportunity to experience real adventures. Our team of professionals will help you find the vehicle that is perfect for you.
